# services.icecast

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.icecast`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.icecast.admin.password` | `string` | Password used for all administration functions. |
| `services.icecast.admin.user` | `string` | Username used for all administration functions. |
| `services.icecast.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Icecast server. |
| `services.icecast.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra configuration added to {file}`icecast.xml` inside the `<icecast>` element. |
| `services.icecast.hostname` | `null or string` | DNS name or IP address that will be used for the stream directory lookups or possibly the playlist generation if a Host header is not provided. |
| `services.icecast.listen.address` | `string` | Address Icecast will listen on. |
| `services.icecast.listen.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | TCP port that will be used to accept client connections. |
